Noble Capital LLC, anticipated profit interest, 1.25% recovery of Chinese bonds redeemed

As a member of the Noble Capital LLC Advisory Board, I advised Noble Capital LLC on the best paths to take with respect to engaging U.S.  businesses and U.S. Government officials to convert these bonds to cash. I had no interaction with any foreign government and advised only the bond holder, who is a U.S. citizen.
Noble Capital RSD LLC, anticipated profit interest, 15% recovery of Russian Federation bonds redeemed

As a member of the Noble Capital RSD LLC Advisory Board, I advised Noble Capital RSD LLC on the best paths to take with respect to engaging U.S.  businesses and U.S. Government officials to convert these bonds to cash. I had no interaction with any foreign government and advised only the bond holder, who is a U.S. citizen.

StrongForce Design anticipated profit interests in sale of 5 patent portfolios. The portfolios are Energy, Transportation, Industrial IoT, Supply Chain, and Financial Transactions capturing the intersection of existing technology and artificial intelligence.

Pursuant to the terms of my agreement with the company, I am currently entitled to receive the balance of my Directors Fee for the 1st quarter of 2025. If confirmed, the company will make this payment to me prior to my appointment. (2023-06-01)

Upon confirmation, I will terminate my contract with Noble Capital RSD LLC. I will retain my interest in receiving 15% of Noble Capital RSD LLC’s net redemption, in the event Noble Capital RSD LLC is able to redeem sovereign debt. (2024-09-01)

Pursuant to the terms of my agreement, I will retain my unvested and vested restricted stock units. The unvested restricted stock units will continue to vest on a monthly basis until the remaining balance fully vests in 11/2027. (2022-07-01)

Upon confirmation, I will terminate my contract with Noble Capital LLC. I will retain my interest in receiving 1.25% of Noble Capital LLC’s net redemption, in the event Noble Capital LLC is able to redeem sovereign debt.” (2024-09-01)
Pison Stream will pay the outstanding invoice for consulting fees immediately upon available funding. (2023-10-01)

Pursuant to the terms of my agreement, I will continue to hold my warrants in Strong Force Design Intellectual Property. I also hold a profits interest in the sale of StrongForce Design’s 5 patent portfolios, if all 5 portfolios sell as a group to a buyer I introduced to the company. (2024-09-01)
Pursuant to the terms of my agreement, I will retain my unvested and vested stock options. (2025-02-01)

My consulting business will be inactive during my appointment and all outstanding Director and client fees will be fixed before I enter government service.  I will continue to receive royalties from the books I authored. I will also  continue to maintain my self-directed 401(k) and will not make further contributions once my business is in an inactive status. (2021-04-01)
Pursuant to the terms of my agreement, I will retain my vested stock options. (2024-01-01)
Pursuant to the terms of my agreement, all unvested common stock will be forfeited upon separation from the company.  I will retain my vested common stock. (2024-06-01)
Upon confirmation, I will resign from the board of Jefferson Consulting Group and maintain my stock options consistent with my contract. (2024-12-01)
